title: Calculation Date function using interval and year
poc: CREATE TABLE dim_tempo ( id_tempo double precision, data timestamp without time zone );
select data from dim_tempo where data between cast ('2013-01-01 'as timestamp) + INTERVAL' -1 'year and cast ('2013-01-02 'as timestamp) + INTERVAL' -1 'year;
CREATE TABLE dim_tempo ( id_tempo integer, data date );
select data from dim_tempo where data between cast ('2013-01-01 'as date) + interval' -1 'year and cast ('2013-01-02 'as date) + interval' -1 'year;
key_bug_features: Calculation Date function using interval with year
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_1 ( id_tempo serial PRIMARY KEY, data timestamp without time zone NOT NULL );
SELECT data FROM dim_tempo_1 WHERE data BETWEEN CAST('2013-01-01' AS timestamp) + INTERVAL '-1 year' AND CAST('2013-01-02' AS timestamp) + INTERVAL '-1 year';
CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_2 ( id_tempo integer PRIMARY KEY, data date NOT NULL CHECK (data >= '2000-01-01') );
